title: Unnecessary imports should be removed
description: Unused imports may increase the size of the code and potentially obscure the actual imports.

noncompliant.code:
import os
import sys
sys.path.append('/path/to/somewhere')
def my_function():
    pass
noncompliant.description: Unnecessary import of sys and os modules

compliant.code:
import os
import sys
import math
def my_function():
    pass
compliant.description: Necessary imports of os, sys, and math modules

why_is_this_an_issue: Unused imports may increase the size of the code and potentially obscure the actual imports.
